rationale: Gov't Code §2306.177 governs departmental hearings and testimony procedures. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote:
The department may:
(1) conduct hearings; and
(2) take testimony and proof, under oath, at public hearings, on matters necessary to carry out the department's purposes.
_note: Rule concerns TDHCA hearing authority; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
